Description
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.nfc

  • Classes in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.nfc used by de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.nfc
    Class
    Description
    NfcUnitService.ScanResult
    Outcome of a scan, describing what the tag triggered.
  • Classes in de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.nfc used by de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.nfc
    Class
    Description
    NfcScanBroadcast
    Wire format of an NFC scan broadcast on the MQTT status channel.
    NfcScannedEvent
    Domain event raised by NfcUnitService.scan(String, PUser) once a tag scan has been processed.
    NfcUnitService.NfcUnitData
    Editable tag fields, decoupling the service from HTTP DTOs.
    NfcUnitService.ScanResult
    Outcome of a scan, describing what the tag triggered.
